title: builds from git repo URLs don't recurse submodules
body:
**Description**

builds from git repo URLs don't recurse git submodules.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. podman build -t foo git://github.com/dustymabe/dustymabe.com#delete

This is a git repo with a submodule. The `delete` branch has a [Dockerfile](https://github.com/dustymabe/dustymabe.com/blob/delete/Dockerfile) that will fail if the submodule doesn't get cloned.


```
[core@localhost ~]$ podman build -t foo git://github.com/dustymabe/dustymabe.com#delete
STEP 1: FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33
STEP 2: ADD . /context/
--> 6621657d51a
STEP 3: RUN test -f /context/hugo/themes/beautifulhugo/LICENSE
Error: error building at STEP "RUN test -f /context/hugo/themes/beautifulhugo/LICENSE": error while running runtime: exit status 1

$ rpm -q podman
podman-3.0.1-1.fc33.x86_64
```

This works fine when building with `docker`:

```
$ sudo docker build -t foo git://github.com/dustymabe/dustymabe.com#delete
Sending build context to Docker daemon  30.03MB
Step 1/3 : FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33
 ---> 9f2a56037643
Step 2/3 : ADD . /context/
 ---> bd47e74b4a04
Step 3/3 : RUN test -f /context/hugo/themes/beautifulhugo/LICENSE
 ---> Running in e02c98106c90
Removing intermediate container e02c98106c90
 ---> d03c032aab31
Successfully built d03c032aab31
Successfully tagged foo:latest

$ rpm -q moby-engine
moby-engine-19.03.13-1.ce.git4484c46.fc33.x86_64
```

comments.body:
I think this was fixed and then we regressed. It was working fine at one point:

```
[dustymabe@media ~]$ rpm -q podman
podman-3.4.7-2.fc35.x86_64
[dustymabe@media ~]$ podman build -t foo https://github.com/dustymabe/dustymabe.com.git#delete
STEP 1/3: FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33
Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 2861e4f9ec1a done  
Copying config 3e786a3571 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
STEP 2/3: ADD . /context/
--> f92203c90e9
STEP 3/3: RUN test -f /context/hugo/themes/beautifulhugo/LICENSE
COMMIT foo
--> 7f9b32e286c
Successfully tagged localhost/foo:latest
7f9b32e286c50f204edb7927f63cc5a7674acc7cf4e788842545fe233ad5248c
```

but now it's not:

```
[core@weevm ~]$ rpm -q podman
podman-4.3.1-1.fc37.x86_64
[core@weevm ~]$ podman build -t foo https://github.com/dustymabe/dustymabe.com.git#delete
STEP 1/3: FROM registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33
Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 2861e4f9ec1a done  
Copying config 3e786a3571 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
STEP 2/3: ADD . /context/
--> ae1ee14cb30
STEP 3/3: RUN test -f /context/hugo/themes/beautifulhugo/LICENSE
Error: building at STEP "RUN test -f /context/hugo/themes/beautifulhugo/LICENSE": while running runtime: exit status 1
```

@flouthoc - maybe a regression with some of the recent changes we made to build?

> I think this was fixed and then we regressed. It was working fine at one point:

Opened: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/4453
